Son Tran

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Time Off Implementation
entry.content: Nice prose and interesting content. Thanks again.

entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content: @jravnik @MMonis standalone SAP Event Mesh is not available in BTPEA contracts, hence why you can't find it in the SAP Discovery Center. That said, there is a new Event Mesh capability in SAP Integration Suite - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/meet-your-new-friend-emis-event-mesh-in-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/13731129. You can find more details in that blog post and you can also join the live stream scheduled for Wednesday - https://www.youtube.com/live/tUIG34xT3oo - to learn more.

entry.title: Re: How to get started in Career Corner?
entry.content:
MiSu... Please check out the SAP Career site for jobs in CEE/MEE/DACH including Czech Republic. These are with SAP only... there are other job boards for SAP customers and partners.

I like the description at the top of this area on how to get started. Career Corner is a place to "explore different paths and learn from and with like-minded members, connect with them, and find out more about open positions in the SAP ecosystem. Career Corner is a space where you can ask your peers for career advice, share certification recommendations, and interview guidance."

Wishing you the very best in the next steps of your job and career journey!

entry.title: Develop an application utilizing the RAP Web API with SAP Build Apps framework in S4Hana OnPremise
entry.content:
In this blog it will be shown how SAP Restful Application Programming Model can be used and consumed in SAP Build App to create an APP.

Technology used:

  1. SAP RAP
  2. SAP Build Apps
  3. SAP BTP

 

Development Steps:

    1.  Create RAP Model objects in Managed scenario.

  •  Database Table
  • Interface View
  • Transactional View
  • Consumption View
  • Transactional Behavior Definition
  • Consumption Behavior Definition
  • Service Definition
  • Service Binding

 

     2. The Service Binding should be published as Web API.

   3. Create a Destination .

 

 

    4. Create A SAP App in SAP Build Apps using the RAP service.

       

        5. Home Page to Display list of records.

           

         6. Update Page to Create New Records.

 

Test :

  1. Open the APP in Preview Mode. It will display all the existing records in the Table using RAP service.

 

 

      2. After click ‘Create New Student’ button Update page will open. Create a New Record.

                  

       3. After Create button clicked. New record will be created using RAP Post service.

 

     4. You can also see the data in ADT Data Preview .

 

 

 

This blog summarizes how to utilize RAP services within SAP Build Apps, detailing necessary configurations in SAP BTP.

entry.title: Re: Posting Material document via SAP Build
entry.content:
I'm not an expert on this or most S/4HANA APIs. Generally, I simply run the API and use any error messages to figure out what properties are required. Did you call the API, and if so, what was returned?

You can get additional info from either the SAP Business Accelerator Hub (which you referenced above) or the documentation, like here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/eb2a39dd0c124fed8252f684002d55e1/d4c919581bc30a02e10000000a44147b.html

entry.title: Move the old home page to spaces and pages home page in S/4 public cloud
entry.content:
As per SAP document, I should have "import apps now" icon when spaces and pages are switched on in my system. But, there is none. Is there up-to-date blog available on the spaces and pages? since I can see many changes in my test system with enabled spaces and pages, not matching with the blogs released earlier.

Reference: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/getting-familiar-with-spaces-and-pages-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13575120

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Stuck in userlane tutorial. Can I skip the step?
entry.content:
Can you provide a screenshot of the button. I don't see anything with guided procedures in the lower right of the SAP Build Lobby. There are some in the bottom of SAP Build Apps but not sure that is what you are referring to.

Can you also provide links?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps QR Code generation issue on mobile device
entry.content:
You are using an API or just a URL to a QR code?

Is there any base64 going on here, since that has worked differently on device and web?

And then you want to simply display that image in your app? Could I replicate what you are doing simply by taking a QR code (image) on the web, for example: https://cdn.britannica.com/17/155017-050-9AC96FC8/Example-QR-code.jpg

entry.title: Re: Important Update: Changes to the Free Tier Option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment

entry.title: Re: import prototype from SAP build.me (SAP build classic...
entry.content:
As far as I know, the 2 products are not related at all.

P.S.: The import feature in the SAP Build lobby actually says it takes ZIP files. But again you cannot import old SAP Build files.

entry.title: Freestype UI5 & with OData V4 - Select control in table line item
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm experimenting with a Freestyle UI5 App and a CAP ODataV4 service.

My table's line items are bound to the TaskSet entity. One of the columns features a dropdown list using the sap.m.Select control, and the dropdown list items are bound to the TaskStatusSet entity:

The selected table line item value is displayed accurately:

When I attempt to change the value, the batch request is triggered to the TaskStatusSet entity instead of the TaskSet entity:

My CAP Model:

What am I doing wrong? How can I update the correct entity?

 

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Alex

like this:

I have a background in CPI and I keen eager to upskill in CPI domain.

Thirupathi.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
In [5]: %sql hana://userkey=myDevChallenger

In [6]: %sql SELECT Current_User FROM DUMMY
* hana://userkey=myDevChallenger
Done.
Out[6]: [('DEVCHALLENGER',)]

In [7]: %sql hana://userkey=mydbadmin

In [8]: %sql
...: hana_db_info = %sql SELECT "KEY", "VALUE" FROM "M_HOST_INFORMATION" WHERE "KEY" IN ('build_cloud_edition', 'start_time')
hana://userkey=myDevChallenger
* hana://userkey=mydbadmin
hana://userkey=myDevChallenger
* hana://userkey=mydbadmin
Done.

In [9]: type
Out[9]: type

In [10]: type(hana_db_info)
Out[10]: sql.run.ResultSet

In [11]: hana_db_info.DataFrame()
Out[11]:
key value
0 build_cloud_edition 2024.2.16
1 start_time 2024-06-16 09:19:51.482

In [12]: print("That's the end of the setup exercise!")
That's the end of the setup exercise!

In [13]: quit

entry.title: Automatic Batch determination after outbound delivery created
entry.content:
Hi all, I meet some problems for auto batch determination. For MTO business when I create outbound delivery at first, then having batch info and prepare PGI, the auto batch determination doesn't work. and I have to click batch split and manually do the batch determination. However if we have stocks at first, and create outbound delivery, the batch can be auto determinate. I do not know which elements effect the time for auto batch determination.

Also I have same problem for STO business. because we did some setting about auto-create STO delivery note creation as the same time as  IC PO creating. And we met the same question for auto batch determination do not work. If we delete this DN and create DN one more time, the DN will get the auto batch determination.

could anyone tell me which configuration effect this auto batch determination ?

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: My submission:

entry.title: Is the auto-delegation supported in Performance and Succession?
entry.content:
Hi Team, 
I would like to know if SuccessFactors support the Delegation feature in the Performance and Succession modules. In other words, is the Goals, Performance, Calibration, Succession, Development capable to read the delegation from the Job Relationship portlet and grant the same permissions/access of the delegator?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to enhance idoc message type BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
We would like to extend the message type BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M with custom segments, and enhance the outbound processing to fill the custom fields.
We have previous experiences with message types DEBMAS and CREMAS, and the corresponding BADIs (CUSTOMER_ADD_DATA_BI, VENDOR_ADD_DATA_BI...), what's the equivalent BADI or SAP enhancement for BUPA idoc?
Thanks in advance,
Luis.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Debugger Scripting: Basics
entry.content:
This blog was referenced in a recent SAP-Note "3415810 - New ABAP Debugger Script RSTPDA_SCRIPT_MODIFICATION" introducing a new Debugger Script "RSTPDA_SCRIPT_MODIFICATION" ...
Extract :
"This note implements the ABAP Debugger Script RSTPDA_SCRIPT_MODIFICATION. This script can be used in the ABAP debugger to find note implementations, third-party programs, user exits, BAdI implementations, customer modifications or similar to analyse them. This script can be used by SAP Support and by customers who are experts regarding ABAP Debugger Scripting. If you are not familiar with ABAP Debugger Scripting, you can find information in the documentation and in this blog."

This seems like a very interesting addition to the Debugger Scripts ...

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: How can the manifest be dynamically provided in Compo...
entry.content:
Hi, 

yes it is. Follow the thread here to find pros and cons about providing the manifest.json dynamically. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/solutions-for-supporting-dynamic-odata-annotation-url-for-fiori-elements/qaq-p/12352966

Best regards,

Marcel

entry.title: Re: what is the best way to represent equipment that is at client plant ?
entry.content: The equipment can have partner functions like sold-to, Ship-to etc. This can clearly indicate where the equipment is located and owned. Adding a functional location is a additional burden that has to be carried if that part of the technical object structuring is used.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below category:

 

  • People who are physically disabled or neurodivergent

 

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to develop my skill set with the SAP platform to hopefully be in a position where I can utilize my training to give back to others in the future.

 My Mom had a stroke 5 years ago, and I dedicated my life to taking care of her. My Mom passed away last year, and the 5 year employment gap that I have from taking care of my Mom is making it difficult to re-enter the workforce because the employers view the 5 year gap as an indicator that my skills are not current. I am very appreciative of the opportunity that the digital skills initiative provides because I am hopeful that it will enable me to prove to the interviewers that I have the current and valuable skills to successfully contribute to the job force. 

I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I am grateful for the digital skills initiative opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the digital skills initiative.

Sincerely,

Mike Bretz

entry.title: Re: Error Occured while genrating ABAP Repository Objects for Database Table
entry.content:
Is there any update on this? I am running into the same error message. 

For simple reproduction of the error: I just used MARC table as a starting point for the Object Generator and I am getting this error message.

entry.title: GRDC_Data Mapping issue_Custom fields of ACDOCA
entry.content:
Hi

 

We have few custom fields in ACDOCA table, which are required to be mapped to standard ACDOCU fields via GRDC " Data mapping" functionality.

When we are downloading the mapping template with ACDOCA as source, we are not getting custom fields in template list.

We have already enabled all ODATA & SOAP APIs, for relevant custom fields. Also, we have updated custom fields in "Run data mapping " app.

How the required custom fields from ACDOCA can be generated in data mapping template?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Peppol e-Invoices Singapore - Part 1
entry.content:
Hello Chanchana, any reference for Germany eInvoicing over Peppol with alignment of ZUGFeRD?

Couldn't find any note for country Germany, though there are notes for France, The Netherlands, Sweden, Finland etc. 

Kr, Debashish.

entry.title: MFS - HU at the end of the automatic storage retrieval; sending not required
entry.content:
I'm having an issue with EWM MFS when a handling unit is at a communication point and telegrams won't send.  The error I'm receiving is "HU at the end of the automatic storage retrieval; sending not required".  LIFE messages are working fine.  Open task from CP to next bin with another task in waiting status.

I'm having trouble finding more details on this error.  Has anyone run into this?

entry.title: Re: How can the manifest be dynamically provided in Compo...
entry.content:
https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-sap/add-new-route-to-extension-app-in-sap-ui5/ba-p/13222184

 

if you want to manipulate the router, that should give you some idea.

entry.title: Re: Down-Payment Process without billing plan in SAP
entry.content: Excellent document! Really helpful to many... Very few documents availble on SD downpayment scenario.

entry.title: Re: If I have a list of material numbers, is there a repo...
entry.content:
There is no standard report or tcode to extract text. You have to used table STXH and STXL for extraction.

or with the help of ABAPER you can build customize tcode to meet your requirement.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/material-purchase-order-view-text-report/ba-p/13525035

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE TLS 1.3 support
entry.content:
There has been no change since then; the CR is still open in engineering.  
The KBA is the primary source of information that would be updated when the CR is closed.
The CR would also start appearing in the "Targeted  CR List for  ASE <patch level>" KBA(s) for the patches  it was implemented in, and in the cover letters for those patches.

Cheers,
-bret

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @julieplummer20, 

Something to look at in the next version: Please could you ensure the system profile is consistent with RZ10? 

If I edit the profile in RZ10 there are a bunch of errors and if I generate and save a new version the system will no longer start. It has nothing to do with my changes, as it works fine if I restore the previous .PFL files and directly add my changes in there.

(For what it's worth, I changed the auto logout time and added the icm hostname as some webpages could not be launched from SAPGUI due to missing FQDN - icm/host_name_full = vhcala4hci.dummy.nodomain ).

entry.title: Guide in a needed middleware integration with SAP
entry.content:
Hello community. 

I've been hired as consultant to generate an integration solution middleware for the following need. I'll try to be the most descripitive below: 

My hiring customer has a fintech platform for financial intermediation. One side of their business are the banks and other financial institutions. In the other side, business owners which run SAP (and other ERP systems) in different environments and flavours. My job is to manage a project to produce and deliver in name of my customer, a module, connector, add-on or whatever name implies, for SAP, with the following characteristics: 

  • Confirm online a vendor invoice in business owners SAP ERPs from my customer platform. 
  • Flag the invoice with specific business case data (in case confirmed).
  • Send to my customer platform specific data in some state changed (invoice canceled, deleted, values updated, payment applied, and others). 
  • Show in SAP, in some specific screen or tab the flagging information received from my customer platform

As a new guy to SAP world, I've been researching and got to the point of determining that this can be done technically  either with NetWeaver PI or the C# RFC Connector, and using some trial versions of ABAP Servers. However, I'm lost to the specifics. So, can you please help me out with this inquiries: 


  1. What is the best combination of SAP tools to produce a secure (however private) Internet Facing API that acts a middleware between my customer platform and business owners app. 
  2. Recommended code tool to generate the additional screen or information of flagged invoices for business owners' SAP Users. 
  3. Recommended trial or development SAP servers/platform available for developing and testing purposes. In this case, I'd like to know specifically if there is any version, or in default some way of loading demo data in the environments. Cloud could work, but we prefer local on premises if its available.

Thanks in advance, any other needed info I'm open to answer.

entry.title: SAP Trial installation stalling on unbuntu
entry.content:
hello all,

i downloaded and am trying to install the 7.52 version on an ubuntu virtualbox. whenever the installation begins it stalls like so:

please ask me for any information you need about the virtualbox client or anything else. i am quite new to this as i am trying to learn abap. thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2021 – E-invoicing and statutory reporting made easy with SAP Document and Reporting
entry.content:
Hi Erika, appreciate this post is 3 years old, things have moved forward with DRC. While I there are SAP notes on eInvoicing for many EU countries, none could I find for Germany. Question if I may ask - if a client is on S/4HANA On-Prem 2021 release, and wish to implement eInvoicing to align with ZUGFeRD, do they need S/4HANA DRC Public Edition subscription and connect their On-Prem system with it via cloud connector? This is the common mechanism described for other EU countries, e.g.; The Netherlands, France, with corresponding implementation notes; I assume same mechanism applies to Germany but can't be sure. Any guidance pls?

Kr, Debashish.

entry.title: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery via SAP Host Agent
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to connect an AS Java system to a new Solution Manager 7.2 that I recently built.
While doing that, I discovered, that there is already and SLD_DataSupplier HTTP destination configured
to another Solution Manager and I would not like to destroy that setup. While looking for a solution, I came
across the advice to setup outside discovery via SAP Host Agent. Please kindly let me know if that is wrong!

I found two kinds of instructions and I have implemented them both:

1. https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sl/3362916651.html

While this looks like a quite straight-forward process, I ended up with an empty outside discovery path.
No matter what I did, no files are created in the directory I specified. So, no wonder that when I try to send 
data with the following command:

/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostctrl -function ExecuteOutsideDiscovery -xmlfromconfig -sldreg

it gives an error:

SLDREGStatus , string , ERROR

2. After the above failure, I came across the following SAP note:

2556432 - Switch Outside Discovery from Diagnostics Agent to SAP Host Agent

I have implemented all the instructions in the AgentAdministration console. And... NOTHING !! No idea how
to trigger the data transfer. Some sources which I found on google suggest to use a Preparation tool. I think
this is used for Focused Run. Another sources suggest to trigger the outside discovery over some Launchpad.
Which Launchpad ? No mention of a URL or how to access it 😞 Just Launchpad...

Please kindly try to provide some CLEAR and UNDERSTANDABLE instructions, containing names and menu entries which REALLY exist in a Solution Manager 7.2. I got really frustrated by the lack of a clear path to configure this outside discovery! Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Editing in SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi Parmsethi,

It sounds like you are pretty close.  Have a read of the Getting Started with SAP Companion Community post and see if you can identify your issue.  If you cannot, please add a screenshot of the actual SAP Companion configuration and a screenshot of the Workarea Permissions for the Workarea that you are linking to through SAP Companion.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion browser extension login
entry.content:
Hi Anna,

It's definitely an issue with SSO if SAP Companion works when Manager is open but does not when it is not open.  It works because you create a session cookie by logging into Manager and SAP Companion uses that session cookie also.

I would start by checking with your IT team to see if anything has changed, there are many things that can impact SSO, including changes to browser settings and changes to the network setup.  If you cannot determine the cause of the issue, rase a support ticket using component ID KM-SEN-CMP and get support involved.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE TLS 1.3 support
entry.content: Okay thanks.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: This was fun and interesting.

entry.title: Re: Jobs running by FFID
entry.content: Thank you. But actually the problem is, if we schedule through sm36, whoever are doing that activity it will take as their ID only for "Scheduled by". This need to be changed, so is there anyway to give some standard user rather than who is creating the job. Sm36 was given to FFID, so when FFID execute sm36, the job shows as that FFID as created by . I understand "RUN BY", where we are giving background id. But how we can restrict FFID wont show under SCHEDULED by, as SAP suggested FFID should not be used both for RUN BY and SCHEDULED BY. Please advise.

entry.title: SAP GUI equivalent to VB.NET session.EndTransaction on C#
entry.content:
Hello,

The idea is to go back to the main GUI window after the transaction execution.

In VB.Net the session.EndTransaction works fine.

What is the equivalent alternative when using C#?

Please support.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Guide in a needed middleware integration with SAP
entry.content: Seems like a paas/saas solution that you have been hired to build. Sounds kind of backwards to me that a customer would look for someone to build it vs. a startup builiding a solution in hopes of finding customers.

entry.title: Re: Simplification List for Procurement in S/4 HANA
entry.content: Hi, What is the activation sequence of business function commodity management in S/4HANA 1909

entry.title: SAC Exception Aggregation of NONE
entry.content:
When a measure is set to have NONE as Exception Aggregation, it still displays a total if all (non-null) values being aggregated over are identical.

In my use case, I want the total to show the "/" (crossed-out cell) display for certain totals regardless of whether the values are different or the same.

Is there any convenient way to achieve this?

Kind Regards

entry.title: What is the meaning of SPRAS and LANGU?
entry.content: Might be a silly question but I've searched around in docs and can't get an answer to what is the meaning of SPRAS and LANGU? I'm guessing it is an acronym but I can't find it anywhere. I know it is used for language translation of fields.

entry.title: Re: What is the meaning of SPRAS and LANGU?
entry.content: Pretty sure LANGU is just the first five characters of language which is common for most domains/data elements in SAP, and SPRAS is probably the german translation of "language" restricted to the first five characters... I haven't bothered to verify on Google.

entry.title: Re: What is the meaning of SPRAS and LANGU?
entry.content: Spras from sprachen, makes sense! Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Current_Data() in YYYYMM format in Datasphere View
entry.content: Try this: TO_NVARCHAR(CURRENT_DATE,'YYYYMM')

entry.title: HANA audit log query
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We need SQL query to extract PERSON_NAME DB audit log from PERSON_NAME studio for specific day.

Kindly help us.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: HANA audit log query
entry.content:
Hello,

You can run the query below to get the data of a specific date.
Example below is for 2024-06-15.

select * from audit_log where left(TIMESTAMP, 10) = '2024-06-15' ORDER BY TIMESTAMP;


With query below, you can see the data from 2024-06-15 01:00:00 to 2024-06-15 02:00:00


select * from audit_log where TIMESTAMP between '2024-06-15 01:00:00' and '2024-06-15 02:00:00' ORDER BY TIMESTAMP;

entry.title: Re: Using Market Segments in Margin Analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

Will these fields become available in margin analysis?

1. (fiori app) Manage product master data > Distribution Chain > Product Group 1 or Product Group 2, etc.

2. (fiori app) Manage customer master data > Sales Areas > Additional Data > Customer Group 1, Customer Group 2, etc.

The main fields "Customer Group" and "Product Group" will be used as well.  However, my client has quite a few customer and product attributes, and i plan to use these other grouping fields instead of creating extension fields.  However, i'm unsure if these standard/existing fields in the master data will flow through to standard/pre-delivered margin analysis or sales reports.

Please advice.  Thank you.

Cath

entry.title: How to Make incoming payment line of Business Mandatory if row is selected in sap B1
entry.content:
I am trying to write Sp transaction notification for incoming payment whose line of business should not  empty or null if that row is selected for payment. 

Kindly help on this

entry.title: Question regarding the installation of DAA in a clustered environment
entry.content:
Hi All,

We've implemented HANA DB in a clustered setup across Node A and Node B, while ASCS and ERS are installed on Server A and Server B in a clustered configuration. Now, my next step is to perform Managed System Configuration for these systems within SOLMAN.

To proceed:

1.DAA installation is required on each server, including each node in the clustered environment (Node A, Node B, Server A, Server B, Server C, Server D).
2.Please confirm whether I should use ./sapinst SAPINST_USE_HOSTNAME=<virtualname> or simply ./sapinst on the cluster node.
3.Also, please confirm whether I can use ./sapinst alone to install DAA on the Application servers (Server C and Server D).

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: Re: Insufficient privileges to perform this action. - SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Team,

I too facing the same issue. Even I dont find roles ProcessAutomationAdmin, ProcessAutomationDeveloper and ProcessAutomationParticipant under the Role Collection. Can you please guide me to solve this?

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I am a fresher consultant from Vietnam. I've already joined the beginner corner and completed the learning journey of Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Sales – Fundamental Business Processes.

I want to upskill myself in SAP technology and to study SAP rigorously and get a job opportunity soon.

Regards,

Emma Tran

entry.title: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

 

Does anyone have idea how to download payment media in secured file server from S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Via "Manage Payment  Media" app (F1868), payment media can be downloaded manually, and download file path is determined by web browser settings, not by S/4HANA. A customer is pointing our the risks of data falsification as end-users could edit the downloaded payment media before uploading it to bank communication systems.

On-Premise and PCE can configure the download file path, but I didn't find such function in Public Cloud.

 

If you have any idea or experience to tackle this risk, please share it.

 

Best regards,

Tomoyoshi

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Payment Engine

entry.title: Re: Mass functionality for Report AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE (Solman)
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Monthly requirement periods in MD62 transac...
entry.content:
For independent requirements, the role played by different versions of independent requirements is the same. All of them would be shown in MD04, and take part in MRP running.

The Qty of PIR which maintained by manually, if it's blank, pls check whether you maintained it before.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with Spaces and Pages

entry.title: Re: Activation errors while extending Material number len...
entry.content: The tables are in partial active state in SE14. When we run the adjustment with 'Persist data' option its activating the table but Material field length stays at CHAR 18.

entry.title: The result of loadFragment is undefined.
entry.content:
Hi,SAP UI5 expert,

When loadFragment , the result is undefined .

But in network , the result is 200.

Can anyone help me to resolve this issue?

 

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: The result of loadFragment is undefined.
entry.content:
Hi Jacky

The loadFragment method returns a Promise, so you'll need to handle it accordingly.

 

Regards

RG

entry.title: Re: The result of loadFragment is undefined.
entry.content: Hi, RG, Thanks for comments on this ! But loadFragment is predelivered sap ui5 library .We don't need to define it . please refer to :https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/aeb86c181b9742a2bf88049abf9ccb95

entry.title: how to proceed and what to do with this simplification item checks
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

So actually we are like running to to convert our and then system existing system to S4.

presently we are on EHP 7 and we are doing with the sandbox environment processing with the sand proceeding with sandbox system to S/4HANA 2023.

So right now we have done the basic readiness check and all simplification item checks all notes are implemented and the results are all we can see in the URL.

2913617 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA

Now we're not sure like how to proceed and what to do with this simplification item checks

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to proceed and what to do with this simplificatio...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

According to link SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check – How to do it right, if the return code in the Consistency Check is higher than 7, it will impact and halt the SUM process. I have noticed that there are multiple items with a return code of 8, which need to be resolved before proceeding with the SUM process. It is important to note that the check is performed in client 000 by SUM, so if previous checks were conducted in other clients, the results may vary.

Firstly, the relevance check is performed on the productive client to identify the relevant Simplification Items (SI). Then, the consistency check is carried out on client 000, evaluating only those simplification items that are marked as relevant or potentially relevant to the system. These checks rely on the data from t-code ST03N. It is important to note that the check result may not be accurate if there is no ST03N data available. For more detailed information, please refer to Note 2399707 - Simplification Item Check.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Display Change Logs - Sales Document
entry.content: Great work. Thanks for your information.

entry.title: G/L account used in CJ88
entry.content:
Hi, I am new to Projects Systems.

After executed CJ88 and changed fiscal period, find RA key is not correct.

So in new period we change the RA key and executed CJ88 .

At that time, reverse entry were recorded using G/L account which have no relation to RA key in OKG8.

Are there any other configure to determine the G/L account?
PLM Project System (PS)

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Shrinivasan,

I am really interested to attend this training. Please help.

Regards,

Umapathi

entry.title: 删除外向交货单的影响，如何禁止删除外向交货单
entry.content:
Dear SAP consultant，

在SD发货业务中，我们有时候会因为货物未发、发错货、交货单做错等原因将已过账的外向交货单冲销并删除，然后再重新创建外向交货单发货；对于这种操作，有以下两个疑问：

1、将已过账的交货单冲销并删除，在交货单过账时产生的FI凭证中可以看到交货单号，但交货单实际是不存在的，导致凭证流不完整，我们的财务和审计人员对这种不完整的凭证流表示担忧，这样是否会有系统风险和财务风险？如果这种操作有问题，正确的操作方式是什么？

2、是否有办法限制用户删除外向交货单，如何实现？如果可以禁止删除外向交货单，如何将外向交货单作废？作废后是否能更新对应销售订单的交货状态？如何使其不再出现在VL06等发货报表中对发货人员造成困扰？

Hi,

You mean the table: MCHA & MCH1?

refer below link, Hope it can help you!

entry.title: Re: Patch-Level Independent Bootstrap with own onInit not...
entry.content:
Thank you very much Noel.

My body tag was just this:

 

<body class="sapUiBody sapUiSizeCompact" id="content">
</body>

 

But after following your example I changed it to this

 

<body class="sapUiBody sapUiSizeCompact">
    <div data-sap-ui-component data-name="cvg.workorders" id="content" 
         data-id="container" data-settings='{"id" : "workorders"}'>
    </div>
</body>

 

It did not solve the problem though (First I thought is did but after a cache clear it was back)

entry.title: Re: .NET USING SAP HANA DB REAL_VECTOR
entry.content: I have SAP Hana Cloud...

entry.title: Re: Error Occured while genrating ABAP Repository Objects for Database Table
entry.content:
Hello

It is an ABAP issue.

You are using a coding way generating this error: CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abentable_expressions.htm

Unfortunately for you a lot of technical consultant work badly by using this coding way, not aware than they need to use a try catch.

There is a better way than using this coding way.

entry.title: Re: Tax Depreciation Rate and Dep Start Date Different than Book Depreciation
entry.content:
Hi All,

In addition to having different depreciation keys for book area and tax area, is it possible to have a scenario wherein we have different depreciation start dates for book area and tax area? If so, how can one achieve this? For example: An asset is under construction, but for tax purposes the tax authorities allow deduction based on incurrence of expenditure, then is it possible to have an asset claimed as a deduction (100% deduction in month 1 in which the asset is capitalised for tax purposes) in a period which is different to the capitalisation date for book area purposes?

I would be keen to know how this can be achieved.

 

Thanking you,

 

Malcolm

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Shrinivasan/Ajay,

Greetings!

Unfortunately, we had missed the opportunity in registration, Kindly help here in attending the training.

Thanks

Rama

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group field in quality notifications
entry.content:
Hello Rafael Zaragatzky ,

I did my analysis based on Quality notification type Q2 (Complaint against vendor). I can see that field purchasing group is editable in QM02 transaction. Kindly note that initial data based on purchase order is populate in Q. notification screen.

I did test with changing of purchasing group in QM02 screen, for my system - we have not placed any validation for this point hence system is accepting any purchasing group for given purchase order.

You may check this for your end in QM02 and let us know the outcome for the same. In case of any errors , share the screenshots here.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appear...
entry.content:
Hello,

did you check what development tools are saying ? (error Code in browser ect)

Sadly the error message handling in cloud tools overall is pretty bad, you have to check the Networktab of the Development tools of the Browser to get more information about the error that occurs.

BR
Julian

entry.title: Re: E Mail Header and E mail Body not in proper format fo...
entry.content:
Dear Krishna,

I hope you doing great. If I see you screenshot I see 2 points the email body which looks to me like the generic email text and the email subject.

Both can be configured via the form , Maintain email subject, maintain email template for the body.

This works. If you still struggeling please open a case and adress the case to me.

 

Best regards

 

Didi

entry.title: Scheduling agreement target quantity
entry.content:
Hi, 

Regarding the scheduling agreement(ME31L, ME32L, ME33L), there is a target quantity. 

I was under the impression that the orders could not be placed after reaching the target quantity, but I've heard that orders can still be processed beyond this limit. In this case, I'd like to understand why the target quantity needs to be entered.  What is the function of the target quantity? 

 

Thank you for your consideration.

entry.title: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Hello!

I use the SE16N_CD_KEY table to see if the user changed the data through the DEBUG mode(/H).

Are all date changes in the DEBUG mode recorded in the SE16N_CD_KEY table?

If someone modify the data through DEBUG (in normal case), it always leaves a record in SE16N_CD_KEY, right?

Thanks for all.

entry.title: Hello
entry.content: Hello SAP Community, my name is Vera Kirby, and I am a seasoned consultant specialising in SAP Security and GRC. I have been residing in sunny Perth, Australia for more than 13 years but I originally come from Russia. I am eager to share my knowledge and expertise with the SAP community through my upcoming blogs.

I have completed learning journey in "Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" and planning to do the certification in same.

entry.title: Re: Integrating Employee Central With Concur via Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi Rafael, 

This all work well until you have names with special characters like éàäöèü, etc. 

Concur expect UTF8-BOM format but the Integration Center do not let you chose what encoding you want. As solution we added a conversion in the integration to replace all these characters but this is really 90s technology. Any way around this ? 

Thanks, 

Christopher

entry.title: Re: BAPI for CRM Provider Contract Creation
entry.content:
* Set control parameters, because COMMIT must be done after all orders are created without error
ls_control-commit_after_save = abap_false.
ls_control-submit_order = abap_true.
ls_control-save_with_errors = abap_false.
ls_control-save_order = abap_true.
ls_control-no_init = abap_true.

entry.title: Re: Question regarding the installation of DAA in a clust...
entry.content:
Hi Appuru,

I would request you to go through the below links and decide on the diagnostics installation process.

Agent-on-the-fly for HA Support | SAP Help Portal

1365123 - Installation of Diagnostics Agents - SAP for Me - check attachment.

Please pay special attention to physical/virtual hosts and logical hosts setup in your scenario. Apply below general rules for agents on the fly installation:

In a HA (Switchover scenario) context: For ASCS/ERS and DB.

- Install on ALL Physical or Virtual Hosts (part of the group) one Diagnostics Agent (latest version, see prerequisites section) without specifying any Logical hostname in SWPM.

- No further diagnostics agent required on any logical hosts.

Outside HA (Switchover scenario) context: For App servers.

- If no logical hostname is used on physical/virtual host, then install only one diagnostics agent per host without specifying any logical hostname in SWPM.

- If low number of logical hosts run on physical/virtual host, then install one diagnostics agent per logical hostname and specify relevant logical hostname in SWPM.

- If high number of logical hosts run on physical/virtual host, then install one diagnostics agent on the underlying physical/virtual host without specifying any logical hostname in SWPM.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Kishan

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Thanks for you informational Blog Post.

I am delighted to express my strong interest in participating in the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning! As a Graduate from a remote area in India, I understand the challenges of accessing economic opportunities and quality education in my region. This initiative presents an incredible opportunity for me to gain valuable skills within the SAP Ecosystem and kick start my career in the technology industry.

I will promptly create an SAP account using the provided guidelines and join the beginner corner to engage and seek support during my learning journey.

I'm being part of a consultant I'm much happy to see this event. The areas and service that sap is providing is uniquely serves best efficient for business and to use as I tried to explore, .With the announcement of chance supports my self in lightening up and taking my service to next level which drives as #RISE with SAP . Loves to hear makes me inspires more that boosts my colleagues too
